global_description: Small mollusk with a coiled shell, soft elongated body, typically brown or gray, with a moist texture. The shell is spiraled and hard, providing protection. The body is flexible and extends from the shell, with two pairs of tentacles on the head.

part_details.shell: Coiled, spiraled, hard, usually brown or gray
part_details.body: Soft, elongated, moist, extends from shell
part_details.tentacles: Two pairs, located on head, flexible
